p.a: Pan-and-zoom and click here to see details

search.query: | tstats sum(PREFIX(bytes_in=)) as sum_bytes_in sum(PREFIX(bytes_out=)) as sum_bytes_out where `netflow_search_rule_20062` TERM(exp_ip=$exp_ip$) nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" by _time PREFIX(src_ip=) PREFIX(src_host=) PREFIX(dest_ip=) PREFIX(dest_host=) PREFIX(exp_ip=) PREFIX(src_port=) PREFIX(dest_port=) nfo_hostname protocol_ts $span_token$ | rename exp_ip= as exp_ip | rename src_ip= as src_ip | rename src_host= as src_host | rename src_port= as src_port | rename dest_ip= as dest_ip | rename dest_host= as dest_host | rename dest_port= as dest_port | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" | `dedup_timechart_ts` | `format_ip_column(src_ip_string, src_ip, src_host)` | `format_ip_column(dest_ip_string, dest_ip, dest_host)` | strcat src_ip_string " - " dest_ip_string host_pair | eval summbits = (sum_bytes_in + sum_bytes_out)*8/($span_int$*1000000) | timechart limit=10 $span_token$ sum(summbits) by host_pair useother="f"

p.b: Top Devices by Concurrent Network Conversations
p.a: Pan-and-zoom and click here to see details

search.query: | tstats count as sessions_tint where `netflow_search_rule_20062` TERM(exp_ip=$exp_ip$) nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" by _time PREFIX(exp_ip=) nfo_hostname span=30s | rename exp_ip= as exp_ip | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | timechart $span_token$ avg(sessions_tint) by exp_ip_name

p.b: Top Traffic by Port and Protocol
p.a: Pan-and-zoom and click here to see details

search.query: | tstats sum(PREFIX(bytes_in=)) as sum_bytes_in sum(PREFIX(bytes_out=)) as sum_bytes_out where `netflow_search_rule_20062` TERM(exp_ip=$exp_ip$) nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" by _time PREFIX(src_port=) PREFIX(dest_port=) PREFIX(exp_ip=) PREFIX(src_ip=) PREFIX(dest_ip=) nfo_hostname protocol_ts $span_token$ | rename exp_ip= as exp_ip | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" | rename src_port= as src_port | rename dest_port= as dest_port | rename src_ip= as src_ip | rename dest_ip= as dest_ip | `dedup_timechart_ts` | eval summbits = (sum_bytes_in + sum_bytes_out)*8/($span_int$*1000000) | eval app_port=if(((src_port<dest_port AND src_port!=0) OR dest_port==0),src_port,dest_port) | `format_port_column(dest_port_string, app_port)` | timechart limit=10 $span_token$ sum(summbits) by dest_port_string useother="f"

p.b: Security: Communications with Bad Actors: Inbound/Outbound
p.a: Pan-and-zoom and click here to see details

search.query: | tstats sum(PREFIX(bytes_in=)) as sum_bytes_in sum(PREFIX(bytes_out=)) as sum_bytes_out where `netflow_search_rule_20062` TERM(exp_ip=$exp_ip$) TERM(threat_list_name=*) nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" by _time direction PREFIX(exp_ip=) nfo_hostname PREFIX(src_port=) PREFIX(dest_port=) PREFIX(src_ip=) PREFIX(dest_ip=) protocol_ts $span_token$ | rename exp_ip= as exp_ip | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" | rename src_port= as src_port | rename dest_port= as dest_port | rename src_ip= as src_ip | rename dest_ip= as dest_ip | `dedup_timechart_ts` | eval summbits = (sum_bytes_in + sum_bytes_out)*8/($span_int$*1000000) | timechart limit=10 $span_token$ sum(summbits) by direction useother="f"

p.a: Pan-and-zoom and click here to see details

search.query: | tstats sum(PREFIX(bytes_in=)) as sum_bytes_in sum(PREFIX(bytes_out=)) as sum_bytes_out where `netflow_search_rule_20062` TERM(exp_ip=$exp_ip$) app_name=* nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" by _time app_name PREFIX(app_id=) PREFIX(exp_ip=) nfo_hostname PREFIX(src_port=) PREFIX(dest_port=) PREFIX(src_ip=) PREFIX(dest_ip=) protocol_ts $span_token$ | rename exp_ip= as exp_ip | rename app_id= as app_id | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" | rename src_port= as src_port | rename dest_port= as dest_port | rename src_ip= as src_ip | rename dest_ip= as dest_ip | `dedup_timechart_ts` | eval summbits = (sum_bytes_in + sum_bytes_out)*8/($span_int$*1000000) | strcat app_name " (" app_id "/" dest_port ")" app_string | timechart limit=10 $span_token$ sum(summbits) by app_string useother="f"

p.a: Pan-and-zoom and click here to see details

search.query: | tstats sum(PREFIX(bytes_in=)) as sum_bytes_in sum(PREFIX(bytes_out=)) as sum_bytes_out where `netflow_search_rule_20062` TERM(exp_ip=$exp_ip$) username=* nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" by _time username idp PREFIX(exp_ip=) nfo_hostname PREFIX(src_port=) PREFIX(dest_port=) PREFIX(src_ip=) PREFIX(dest_ip=) protocol_ts $span_token$ | rename exp_ip= as exp_ip | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" | rename src_port= as src_port | rename dest_port= as dest_port | rename src_ip= as src_ip | rename dest_ip= as dest_ip | `dedup_timechart_ts` | eval summbits = (sum_bytes_in + sum_bytes_out)*8/($span_int$*1000000) | strcat username " (" idp ")" user_string | timechart limit=10 $span_token$ sum(summbits) by user_string useother="f"

html.p: You see this message because there is no data for the selected Time Range or the App Setup is not completed.

This dashboard is populated by NetFlow Optimizer (NFO) Logic Module “10062: Network Conversations” (syslogs with nfc_id=20062). This Module identifies and reports hosts with the most traffic (optionally all hosts). It consolidates NetFlow records over a period of time (Data Collection Interval) which all have the same combination of the following fields: Source IP address, Destination IP address, Source port number, Destination port number, Layer 3 protocol. For bidirectional flows the Module stitches request-reply flows inverting source and destination for flows in the opposite direction. It reports consolidated flows separating bytes/packets sent and bytes/packets received.
Please either change the Time Range or make sure that this NFO Logic Module is enabled. See NSO Configuration for more details.
